title: Changelog Sync Feature
summary: Implement changelog synchronization feature that allows users to select a specific git branch as the source for changelog generation.
business_context: Users need to configure which git branch should be monitored for changelog synchronization. This allows flexibility in deployment workflows where changelog generation may come from a different branch than the main production code.
acceptance_criteria: Users can select a changelog branch from available repo branches
Selected branch is persisted to the project configuration
Default branch fallback works when no changelog branch is set
